subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come from the heaven of divine utterance with proof and testimony [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی من سماء البیان بالحجه و البرهان انه
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @justice and wrath of God
